summary: Sam Bankman-Fried founded FTX cryptocurrency exchange in 2019 and built it into one of the world's largest crypto trading platforms before its catastrophic collapse in November 2022. A jury found Bankman-Fried guilty on all seven counts in November 2023, and he was sentenced to twenty-five years in federal prison. Sam Bankman-Fried founded the FTX cryptocurrency exchange in 2019 and built it into one of the world's largest crypto trading platforms before its disastrous collapse in November 2022.
